name: Jyske Invest Globale Aktier KL
summary: Jyske Invest Globale Aktier is an open ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Jyske Invest Fund Management A/S. The fund primarily invests in the public equity markets across the globe. It seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. Jyske Invest Globale Aktier is domiciled in Denmark.
